BaseTemplate.description: Reward-based crowdfunding for independent anime studios

About.meta_description: About Anivest, the reward-based crowdfunding platform for independent anime studios
About.about_paragraph: Anivest is a reward-based crowdfunding platform built for independent anime studios. We connect original creators with backers who want to see more of the stories they love brought to screen.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.

SignUp.meta_description: Effortlessly create an account through our intuitive sign-up process.

DashboardLayout.meta_description: Manage your account from the dashboard.

StudioLayout.meta_description: Manage your studio and crowdfunding projects.

Home.meta_description: Back original anime projects from independent studios on Anivest.
Home.hero_title: Fund the anime you want to watch
Home.hero_subtitle: Anivest connects independent anime studios with backers through reward-based crowdfunding.

Projects.meta_description: Browse anime crowdfunding projects by category on Anivest.
Projects.title: Browse projects
Projects.empty: No projects found in this category yet.

Studio.become_subtitle: Create a studio profile to launch your own crowdfunding projects.
Studio.error_name: Please enter a valid studio name.
Studio.error_slug: Use a lowercase slug with hyphens.
Studio.no_projects: You have not created any projects yet.
Studio.edit_project_subtitle: Update your project and manage its tiers and fund allocation.

Backed.meta_description: Projects you have backed on Anivest.
Backed.title: Projects you've backed
Backed.empty: You haven't backed any projects yet.

Backers.meta_description: Backers of your project and their pledges.
Backers.title: Backers

Studios.meta_description: Browse anime studios and their crowdfunding projects.
Studios.title: Studios
Studios.empty: No studios have been created yet.
Studios.no_projects: This studio has not launched any projects yet.

ProjectForm.gallery_hint: One URL per line. These images will appear in the project carousel.

Pledge.success: Thank you for backing this project!

Contribute.title: Contribute to this project
Contribute.subtitle: Fill in your details below to complete your contribution.
Contribute.sign_in_required: You need to sign in to contribute to this project.
